statement: The cleanest greenfield architecture is Convex as domain/UI store and Temporal as the sole execution runtime for run/window workflows.
rationale: The current engine already has a custom execution substrate inside Convex, while Temporal's workflow/activity/task queue model directly fits that missing layer.
keyAssumptions: Domain tables can remain authoritative without owning transport state
Temporal workflow determinism can be respected by moving all I/O into activities
validationCriteria: A run and a window can be started and driven end-to-end without Convex scheduler tables
Operator controls and status checks are expressible as Temporal starts, queries, signals, or updates
critiquePoints: Requires careful idempotent Convex writes from activities
questions: Should Convex or Temporal be the source of truth for live progress projections?
